=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
08.07.1984
Ireland, Dublin, Slane Castle	
Live In Slane	
very good Aud.

01. Leopard Skin Pillbox Hat [5:14]
02. Blowing In The Wind [4:36]

Total Running Time: [9:50]

Source: CDR (unknown taper, unknown lineage, lossless but 2.5/5 quality)> EAC to wav> FLAC Frontend 1.7.1 to FLAC Level 6

Per Pimm: "Bob Dylan plays an open air concert in the grounds of Slane Castle, where U2 recorded material for their new album in May. Bono appears during the bluesy Leopard Skin Pillbox Hat.  Before the show Dylan asked if he knew the lyrics of the song. 'Yeah, sure,' Bono bluffed. He gets a kick out of sharing the stage with Dylan but in fact doesn't know any of the lyrics and just hums and bawls along. He is familiar with Blowing in the Wind, which is played as the final song, and sings the chorus as well as a whole verse."

Notes: This is uploaded as a quirky curiousity...we are not talking soundboard version of Bad here, folks...just for the collector, the completist, and the curious.

 ~petergoode111

U2Torrents: Torrent 2469 (by petergoode)
